page-title.purpose: Serif page headers; editorial voice for section names.

memo-body.purpose: The one long-read surface — memo prose set in serif so a recommendation reads authored.

body.purpose: Default UI text, tables, descriptions. Prose caps ~70ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase organizing labels — column headers, block titles, badges.

data.purpose: Mono claim ids and inline citations; tabular-nums.

shadows.name: ambient-panel
shadows.purpose: The only shadow: lifts panels a hair in light mode. Removed (none) in dark mode.

motion.name: pulse-live
motion.purpose: Marks a running live pipeline stage. MUST be guarded by prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one real action on a view (Submit application, Scan now, Open memo).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--accent, #3358d4); color: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--accent, #3358d4); border-radius: 8px; padding: 5px 11px; font: 500 12px Inter, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: filter .15s ease-out, transform .12s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #3358d4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .55; cursor: default; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default action button; quiet at rest, accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: var(--panel, #fff); color: var(--ink, #10141a); border: 1px solid var(--line, #e4e7ec); border-radius: 8px; padding: 5px 11px; font: 400 12px Inter, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .15s ease-out, color .15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--accent, #3358d4); color: var(--accent, #3358d4); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #3358d4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Trust-Tier Chip
components.description: Corroboration tier + trust value. Color NEVER travels without the text label (colorblind-safe).
components.css: .ds-tier { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font: 500 11px SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; border-radius: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; } .ds-tier-corr { color: #157f4c; background: #e6f4ec; } .ds-tier-single { color: #a5620a; background: #fbf0dc; } .ds-tier-contra { color: #b42318; background: #fbeae8; } .ds-tier-self { color: #667085; background: #eef0f3; } .ds-tier-inferred { color: #667085; background: none; border: 1px dashed #e4e7ec; }

components.name: Decision Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font: 650 11px Inter, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 20px; } .ds-badge-invest { color: #157f4c; background: #e6f4ec; } .ds-badge-pass { color: #b42318; background: #fbeae8; } .ds-badge-conditional { color: #a5620a; background: #fbf0dc; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text/textarea for the apply form, filters, NL query.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: var(--panel, #fff); color: var(--ink, #10141a); border: 1px solid var(--line, #e4e7ec); border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; font: 400 14px Inter, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,.06); transition: border-color .15s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #98a2b3; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent, #3358d4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #eaeffd; }

components.name: Citation
components.description: Inline clickable claim id embedded in serif memo prose; opens the evidence rail.
components.css: .ds-cite { background: #eaeffd; color: #3358d4; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 1px 6px; margin: 0 1px; cursor: pointer; font: 500 12px SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; transition: filter .15s ease-out; } .ds-cite:hover { filter: brightness(.95); text-decoration: underline; } .ds-cite:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3358d4; outline-offset: 1px; }

narrative.overview: VC Brain is a Bloomberg terminal that reads like a magazine. Reasoning (memos, titles, quotes) is set in a warm editorial serif so a recommendation reads authored and trustworthy; every number, score, and citation is tabular sans/mono so the data stays terminal-precise. The surface is flat and tonally layered — Paper, Paper Sink, Panel — with one accent, Evidence Blue, carrying citations, selection, and primary actions, and a strict green/amber/red/slate trust vocabulary that appears identically everywhere. Components are crisp and tactile: thin borders at rest, a decisive accent shift on interaction.
keyCharacteristics: Serif for reasoning, tabular sans/mono for data — the two-voice split is the identity.
Flat, tonally-layered surfaces; depth from stacked neutrals, not shadow.
One accent (Evidence Blue) reserved for citations, selection, and primary actions.
A semantic trust-tier color language, always paired with a text label.
Density that serves the task; the three screening axes are shown side by side, never blended.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Evidence Blue is the only accent. It appears on citations, current selection, and primary actions — nothing else. Its rarity is what makes a citation legible as a link to proof.

rules.name: The Trust-Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: Green/amber/red/slate mean corroborated/single-source/contradicted/self-reported everywhere, without exception. A tier color is never reused for decoration and never travels without its text label.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Serif is for reasoning a human reads (memos, titles, quotes). Sans and mono are for data and chrome. Never set a memo in sans; never set a data label in serif.

rules.name: The Flat-Terminal Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Depth is tonal, not cast. If a component needs a shadow to separate from its background, the wrong background tone is being used — reach for Panel over Paper instead.

dos: Do reserve Evidence Blue (#3358d4) for citations, current selection, and the one primary action per view.
Do keep green/amber/red/slate meaning corroborated/single-source/contradicted/self-reported, and always pair a tier color with its text label (WCAG-AA + colorblind-safe).
Do set memos, page titles, and evidence quotes in Newsreader serif; set all data, labels, and citations in Inter/mono with tabular-nums.
Do show the three screening axes and the Signal/Coverage split as separate values, never averaged.
Do render gaps and contradictions with weight — a flagged 'not disclosed' or a pinned contradiction is a feature of the surface.
Do convey depth with tonal layers (Paper -> Panel -> Wash) and interaction with border/background shifts.
Do guard every animation (currently the pulse on live stages) with prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't look like consumer fintech — no pastel rounding, playful illustration, or Robinhood/Cash-App softness.
Don't look like enterprise legacy (Salesforce-y) — no cluttered toolbars, dated corporate blues, heavy chrome.
Don't look like generic SaaS/AI-dashboard slop — no purple-blue AI gradients, gradient hero cards, identical icon-card grids, or big-number KPI template.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or border-left/right color stripes as accents.
Don't cast shadows to separate a surface — fix the background tone instead.
Don't introduce a second accent hue, and never reuse a trust-tier color for decoration.
Don't nest cards, and don't let a wide table scroll the page body — wrap it in .tablewrap.
